zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich於1495年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Thomas Masterson of Nantwich30歲，母親Lady Agnes Jodrell26歲。他和Margery Mainwaring至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1551年享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich于1495年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Thomas Masterson of Nantwich30岁，母亲Lady Agnes Jodrell26岁。他和Margery Mainwaring至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1551年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maisterson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English maister ‘master’ + -son. Compare Master .
Irish: in Ireland, this is usually the English name in 1 above. However, it was also adopted for Irish Mac an Mháighistir ‘son of the master’, also Anglicized as McMaster .

variants.name: Master
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Amar, Dhimant, Pravin, Amit, Aruna, Bhanu, Gaurang, Gopal, Haren, Jagu, Jayesh, Kalpesh.

English: occupational name from Middle English maister ‘master’ (Old French maistre). The word had a wide range of applications, and the reference in surnames may be to a schoolmaster, to the master of a farm or house, to the master of an apprentice, or to a ship's captain. In Scotland the eldest sons of barons and the uncles of lords were called Masters, but this is not primarily a Scottish surname.
German: dialect form of   Meister   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: McMaster
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mháighistir ‘son of the master’, meaning ‘teacher’ or ‘cleric’. It could also be applied in the sense of ‘lord’ or ‘owner’. This name was sometimes Anglicized as Masterson .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich was born in 1495, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Masterson of Nantwich, was 30 and his mother, Lady Agnes Jodrell, was 26. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Margery Mainwaring. He died in 1551, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich est né en 1495, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Masterson of Nantwich, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Jodrell, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Margery Mainwaring. Il est décédé en 1551, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich 1495 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Masterson of Nantwich 30 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Jodrell 26. Er hatte mit Margery Mainwaring mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1551 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich è nato il nel 1495 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Masterson of Nantwich, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Jodrell, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Margery Mainwaring. Morì nel 1551, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Maisterson of Nantwichが1495年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Masterson of Nantwichは30歳，母Lady Agnes Jodrellは26歳であった。彼はMargery Mainwaringとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1551年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich(이)가 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Masterson of Nantwich(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Jodrell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margery Mainwaring(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1551년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich nasceu em 1495, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Masterson of Nantwich, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Jodrell, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Margery Mainwaring. Ele faleceu em 1551, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich родился в 1495 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Masterson of Nantwich было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Jodrell, 26. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Margery Mainwaring. Он умер в 1551 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich nació en 1495, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Masterson of Nantwich, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Jodrell, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Margery Mainwaring. Murió en 1551, a la edad de 56 años.
